boundary: This is a local Band-ready collaboration proof. It does not claim a live Band API transcript until Band account/API access is available.

agents.name: Release Planner Agent
agents.responsibility: Open the release room and publish scope, owners, and policy gates.

agents.name: Risk Evidence Agent
agents.responsibility: Convert repository and CI context into structured release-risk facts.

agents.name: QA Test Agent
agents.responsibility: Turn the risk facts into targeted regression, contract, and workflow tests.

agents.name: Human Review Agent
agents.responsibility: Hold promotion until a reviewer approves the evidence packet.

handoffs.payload: 12 changed files, 4 owned services, 2 critical routes, release gate changed
Risk score 71, auth callback contract changed, invoice retry branch weakened
Three targeted tests recommended with owners and acceptance criteria
Decision remains hold-for-human-review until evidence is approved

generated_actions: Generate OAuth nonce replay regression test
Prepare release gate API contract fixture diff
